results.rendered_html: skambha m. a prop, support, pillar, buttress, fulcrum, the Fulcrum of the Universe (personified in  AV. x, 7  and x, 8 , and identified with Brahman, the Supreme Being, as well as with Puruṣa; see  Muir's Sanskrit Texts, v, 378 ),  RV. ;  AV.

results.rendered_html:
skambha (wie eben) m.
1〉 = stambha Stütze, Strebepfeiler  ṚV. 1,34,2 . divaḥ skambhaḥ samṛtaḥ pāti nākam 4,13,5 . 8,41,10 . 9,74,2 . 86,46 . 10,5,6 . 44,4 .  AV. 10,7,2. fgg.  4. fgg.  8,2 .  CŪLIKOP. _in_ Ind. St. 9,15. fg. 
— 2〉 N. pr. eines Mannes gaṇa kuñjādi zu  P. 4,1,98 .
— Vgl. skāmbhāyana.
